notable_phrases: better than expected demand in May and June
we expect all the non-iPhone product categories to have very strong year-over-year performance
summary: Apple reported strong June quarter results with record revenue of $59.7 billion despite COVID-19 uncertainty, driven by better-than-expected iPhone demand, supply-constrained Mac and iPad growth, and record services performance, with management expressing optimism about continued momentum.
change_summary: No material changes detected vs 2020 Q2; scores broadly stable QoQ.
